output: Completed batch 5 task `T7`. `TimelineEditor.test.ts` no longer references the deleted final-video helper/types, and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` now asserts the pinned-only canvas/context-menu behavior with `finalVideoMap`. Both full test modules passed, and progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532/execution_batch_5.json`.
deviations: Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/debt.json, .megaplan/plans/remove-inferred-shot-groups-20260406-1532
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC8 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `TimelineEditor.test.ts` to remove the deleted `resolveFinalVideoShotIds` coverage and its `ShotFinalVideo` import. Updated `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` to use `finalVideoMap` instead of `finalVideoShotIds`, removed `onShotGroupPin`, removed `isPinned` from test shot-group fixtures, and rewrote the group/menu expectations to match the pinned-only canvas and context-menu behavior. Verification: `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.test.ts` passed (6 tests), `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` passed (8 tests), and grep found no remaining `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `ShotFinalVideo`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, or `isPinned` references in those two test files. The canvas test run emitted a non-failing `[PERF] render-storm` stderr warning but still passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed. `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` compile and pass without references to the deleted symbols: grep returns no `resolveFinalVideoShotIds`, `ShotFinalVideo`, `finalVideoShotIds`, `onShotGroupPin`, or `isPinned` matches in those two files, and both full vitest modules passed.
